text:
​"Hi everyone! I'm Samiya murtaza a GSoC 2026 applicant for the R Project for Statistical Computing. I've submitted my proposal and I'm really excited about the potential to contribute.
​I’ve been exploring the rdevguide and some of the core repositories. While I wait for the results, I’d love to help out with any 'good first issues' or documentation improvements. Looking forward to learning from this amazing community! :blush:"
